title: Saudi Arabian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Saudi Arabia, made with tender chicken and spices.

ingredients.name: arabian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: tagine
ingredients.notes: ground, available at most Middle Eastern markets or online

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the diced onion and pepper to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, Arabian spice blend, and tagine to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Return the chicken to the pot and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add 1 cup of chicken broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
